confirm.title: Pair BLE knob
confirm.description: Pair with {name} ({address})? Make sure the knob is awake and in Bluetooth pairing mode.

user.title: Select a BLE HID device
user.description: Devices currently advertising the Bluetooth HID service. Wake your knob and put it in pairing mode if it is not listed.

abort.no_devices_found: No BLE HID devices found. Wake the knob and put it in pairing mode, then try again.
abort.pairing_failed: Pairing failed. Wake the knob, make sure it is not connected to another host (phone/laptop), and try again.

init.title: Key mapping
init.description: Map Linux evdev keycodes to knob actions. Defaults match the VK01 factory firmware (115 = volume up, 114 = volume down, 113 = mute). If you remapped keys in the Anticater app, watch the ble_knob_event in Developer Tools → Events to read the codes being sent.
